creator: valdemar@erk.dev
text:
I have just been able to build 1.46.2 (ports hash: 6542d237f6b3aad85a155e54702cb976b957228e) without any issues (except that it uses a lot of memory to build 4GB ram + 2GB swap was not enough so I added a 8GB swapfile)
